rule_statement: Non-compete clauses extending beyond the term of the contract are generally void under Section 27 of the Indian Contract Act.
trigger_condition: If clause restricts contractor from working with competitors after contract terminates.

rule_statement: Assignment of pre-existing intellectual property must be explicitly compensated. Broad assignment without boundaries risks the freelancer's prior toolkits/codebases.
trigger_condition: If clause assigns 'all IP' or 'pre-existing IP' rather than 'work product'.
